name: Chocolate Eclairs 3
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat water and butter to a rolling boil in a saucepan.
2. Stir in flour, stirring vigorously over low heat until the mixture forms a ball (about 1 minute).
3. Remove from heat. Beat eggs one at a time into the batter until smooth.
4. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto an ungreased baking sheet about 2 inches apart.
5. Bake on medium-high heat for 40 minutes, or until lightly browned.
6. Cut a slit in each pastry shell and bake for an additional 5 to 10 minutes.
7. Allow the eclairs to cool completely.
8. Slice off about one-third of the top of each shell and fill with filling (see instructions below).
9. Scoop out some of the filling from each shell to make room for more filling, then replace the tops.
10. Frost the eclairs immediately before serving.
Filling Instructions:
1. Prepare the vanilla pudding according to package directions using only 1 ½ cups of milk.
2. Let the pudding cool completely.
3. Fold in the Cool Whip until well combined.
4. Melt chocolate and butter together in a saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly.
5. Stir in powdered sugar and remaining milk until smooth.
6. Do not prepare this frosting ahead of time; it must be used immediately to frost the eclairs.
